title: phaca inepta
parts: Phaca inepta has many medicinal parts, such as roots, leaves, flowers, and stems. The roots of Phaca inepta are known to contain iridoid glycosides, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever and digestive issues. The leaves of this plant are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The flowers and stems of Phaca inepta are also used in traditional medicine and contain sesquiterpenes and saponins, respectively, which have been used to treat respiratory and skin issues.
